commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Microsoft Teams `msteams` voice-call provider with an HMAC-authenticated bridge WebSocket, inbound audio/video handling, realtime and streaming agent paths, config/docs/tests, and SecretRef metadata.

PR surface: Source +2498, Tests +1885, Docs +139. Total +4522 across 26 files.

Reproducibility: yes. From source, an inactive `createMsteamsRealtimeCall` still forwards `pushAudio()` to `realtime.sendAudio`, while the tests only prove consult/task/transcript gating.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can enforce the realtime recording gate and add focused tests; maintainer feature selection can follow after that blocker is gone.
